creator: thor@irk.ru
text:
When I mount a flash drive with Windows FAT-32 filesystem containing files whose names contain a "№" (No.) symbol CP1251=0xb9,  these files cannot be accessed. File is seen in listing with "?" instead of "№". Message is "Cannot stat". Keys -W koi2dos or -L ru_RU.KOI8-R don't help.

This problem has meen met before and resolved with creating a custom /somewhere/in/filesystem/koi2dos file remapping a number sign to copyright sign, but mount_msdos doesn't seem to read such file now.

Fix: 

No idea. Maybe find a prehistoric version of FreeBSD and take a working mount_msdosfs from here?
How-To-Repeat: Create under Windows a flash drive containing a single file named "файл №1" (Translated: "File No.1") and try to access it under FreeBSD
